task_completion.description: Verify the depreciation journal entry is recorded correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A journal entry (or lines within a combined entry) is created or listed with Date '2026-03-31', Debit 'Depreciation Expense' $450.00, Credit 'Accumulated Depreciation' $450.00, and narration 'Monthly depreciation — office equipment'.

task_completion.description: Verify the prepaid insurance journal entry is recorded correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A journal entry (or lines within a combined entry) is created or listed with Date '2026-03-31', Debit 'Insurance Expense' $300.00, Credit 'Prepaid Insurance' $300.00, and narration 'Monthly insurance expense recognition'.

task_completion.description: Verify the accrued wages journal entry is recorded correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A journal entry (or lines within a combined entry) is created or listed with Date '2026-03-31', Debit 'Wages Expense' $2,400.00, Credit 'Wages Payable' $2,400.00, and narration 'Accrued wages for period end'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent checked the Balance Sheet report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Balance Sheet report is visible on the screen, showing the agent navigated to Reports -> Balance Sheet to verify the entries.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Manager.io web interface to create the journal entries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Manager.io web UI in a browser to add journal entries.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using terminal commands like sqlite3 or curl to insert the journal entries directly into the database.

integrity.description: The Balance Sheet viewed is within the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Balance Sheet is displayed within the Manager.io interface, not as a separate text file or mock document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct date for all journal entries is 2026-03-31. The amounts are $450.00 for depreciation, $300.00 for insurance, and $2,400.00 for wages. The passing threshold is 65 points.
